SEARCH
Package ru.tehkode.permissions

Interface NativeInterface

public interface NativeInterface
Classic PermissionsEx host SPI (1.23.x-era surface).

Platform integrations implement this interface to bridge player identity, online status, and event dispatch to the permission engine. Proxy hosts may implement only

invalid reference 
dev.rono.permissions.api.runtime.PlatformAdapter
for platform-neutral integration.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    callEvent(PermissionEvent event)
    Dispatches a PermissionEvent through the platform event bus.
    UUID
    getServerUUID()
    Returns the UUID that identifies this server instance in network events.
    boolean
    isOnline(UUID uuid)
    Returns whether the player identified by uuid is currently online on this server.
    UUID
    nameToUUID(String name)
    Resolves a player name to their UUID.
    String
    UUIDToName(UUID uid)
    Resolves a player UUID to their current display name.

  • Method Details

    • UUIDToName

      String UUIDToName(UUID uid)
      Resolves a player UUID to their current display name.
      Parameters:
      uid - player UUID
      Returns:
      player name, or null if the UUID is unknown

    • nameToUUID

      UUID nameToUUID(String name)
      Resolves a player name to their UUID.
      Parameters:
      name - player name (case sensitivity depends on the platform)
      Returns:
      player UUID, or null if the name is unknown or offline-only

    • isOnline

      boolean isOnline(UUID uuid)
      Returns whether the player identified by uuid is currently online on this server.
      Parameters:
      uuid - player UUID
      Returns:
      true if the player is connected

    • getServerUUID

      UUID getServerUUID()
      Returns the UUID that identifies this server instance in network events.
      Returns:
      server UUID; never null

    • callEvent

      void callEvent(PermissionEvent event)
      Dispatches a PermissionEvent through the platform event bus.
      Parameters:
      event - permission event to fire; must not be null
